name: twitter-media-dl
author: Cat-Ling
title: Twitter/X Downloader
description: Download images and videos from Twitter/X using vxtwitter/fxtwitter API.

settings.name: sortByNames
settings.title: Sort by Username
settings.description: Save media in subfolders by username

settings.name: sortByDate
settings.title: Sort by Date
settings.description: Save media in subfolders by tweet date (YYYY-MM-DD)

settings.name: sortByType
settings.title: Sort by Media Type
settings.description: Save media in subfolders by type (image/video)

settings.name: saveJson
settings.title: Save Metadata JSON
settings.description: Save a JSON file with tweet metadata alongside the media

settings.name: enableDeduplication
settings.title: Enable Deduplication - Experimental
settings.description: Prevent downloading the same tweet multiple times
